---
title: "Scope DMA Waveform Analysis"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: config
#| tags: [parameters]

FILENAME = "D:/work/measurements/scope_ch2_20260629_174815_001.h5"
```

# Load Data

```{python}
#| label: load
import h5py
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

with h5py.File(FILENAME, "r") as f:
    waveforms = f["waveforms"][:]
    time_ns = f["time_ns"][:]
    channel = f.attrs["channel"]
    timestamp = f.attrs["recording_timestamp"]
    frame_samples = f.attrs["frame_samples"]
    samples_per_frame = f.attrs["samples_per_frame"]
    total_frames = f.attrs["total_frames"]

print(f"File: {FILENAME}")
print(f"Channel: {channel}")
print(f"Total frames: {total_frames}")
print(f"Samples per frame: {samples_per_frame}")
print(f"Frame size (bytes): {frame_samples}")
print(f"Waveform shape: {waveforms.shape}")
print(f"Time axis: {time_ns[0]:.0f} - {time_ns[-1]:.0f} ns")
```

# Waveform Statistics

```{python}
#| label: stats
print(f"ADC range: [{waveforms.min()}, {waveforms.max()}]")
print(f"Mean (per frame): {waveforms.mean(axis=1).mean():.1f} +/- {waveforms.mean(axis=1).std():.1f}")
print(f"Std  (per frame): {waveforms.std(axis=1).mean():.1f} +/- {waveforms.std(axis=1).std():.1f}")
print(f"Min amplitude (global): {waveforms.min()}")
print(f"Max amplitude (global): {waveforms.max()}")
```

# Random 10 Impulses

```{python}
#| label: random-impulses
#| fig-cap: "10 randomly selected waveforms"
rng = np.random.default_rng(42)
indices = rng.choice(total_frames, size=min(10, total_frames), replace=False)
indices.sort()

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))
for idx in indices:
    ax.plot(time_ns, waveforms[idx], alpha=0.7, linewidth=0.8, label=f"#{idx}")
ax.set_xlabel("Time [ns]")
ax.set_ylabel("Amplitude [ADC counts]")
ax.set_title("Random Impulses")
ax.legend(fontsize=7, ncol=2)
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

# Average Impulse

```{python}
#| label: average-impulse
#| fig-cap: "Average waveform with +/- 1 std band"
avg = waveforms.mean(axis=0).astype(np.float64)
std = waveforms.std(axis=0).astype(np.float64)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))
ax.plot(time_ns, avg, color="C0", linewidth=1.5, label="Mean")
ax.fill_between(time_ns, avg - std, avg + std, alpha=0.25, color="C0", label="+/- 1 std")
ax.set_xlabel("Time [ns]")
ax.set_ylabel("Amplitude [ADC counts]")
ax.set_title(f"Average Impulse (n={total_frames})")
ax.legend()
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

# Amplitude Distribution

```{python}
#| label: amplitude-dist
#| fig-cap: "Distribution of peak (minimum) amplitudes across all frames"
peaks = waveforms.min(axis=1)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.hist(peaks, bins=100, color="C0", alpha=0.7, edgecolor="black", linewidth=0.3)
ax.set_xlabel("Peak Amplitude [ADC counts]")
ax.set_ylabel("Count")
ax.set_title("Peak Amplitude Distribution")
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

print(f"Peak amplitude: mean={peaks.mean():.1f}, std={peaks.std():.1f}")
print(f"Range: [{peaks.min()}, {peaks.max()}]")
```
